Bash(git -C /home/aristoi/scripture/superrustacian/supervillain-rs commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add configurable icon URL to split inbox tabs

Allows setting an icon per split via a URL in splits.json \(e.g. from
dashboardicons.com\), falling back to the existing hardcoded SVG icons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/aristoi/scripture/superrustacian/supervillain-rs commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix RSVP correctness, add CANCEL handling, send iTIP as text/calendar

RSVP Accept/Maybe now PUTs the original REQUEST ICS with updated
PARTSTAT to CalDAV instead of the minimal REPLY skeleton, preserving
location, description, and all attendees. RSVP email includes the ICS
as a text/calendar MIME part per RFC 6047. METHOD:CANCEL emails now
auto-remove events from calendar. RsvpStatus enum validates input at
the API boundary, and CalDAV/send failures are logged instead of
silently swallowed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/aristoi/scripture/supervillain commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add mobile PWA shell for iOS support \(THE-159\)

Verified Fastmail JMAP API supports CORS from any origin, confirming
the direct-to-JMAP PWA architecture. Adds /mobile/ route with login
screen, service worker, manifest, and icons — all purely additive,
no changes to the existing desktop app.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/aristoi/scripture/supervillain commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add JMAP client ES module for mobile PWA \(THE-160\)

Extract inline JMAP code from index.html into jmap.js ES module
exporting connect\(\), jmapCall\(\), getSession\(\), saveSession\(\),
clearSession\(\), and blobUrl\(\). Typed errors \(JmapAuthError vs
JmapNetworkError\) replace string comparison for auth detection.
index.html now imports from the module. Bumps SW cache version.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/aristoi/scripture/supervillain commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Wrap resp.json\(\) in try/catch and document blobUrl template assumption

Addresses review findings: malformed JSON responses now throw
JmapNetworkError instead of untyped errors. Adds comment noting
blobUrl\(\) assumes Fastmail''s simple RFC 6570 URI template form.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/aristoi/scripture/supervillain commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix infinite scroll, pull-to-refresh bounce, and minor robustness issues

Separate PAGE_SIZE \(50\) from CACHE_LIMIT \(200\) so infinite scroll
actually loads more emails beyond the initial batch. Use passive: false
on touchmove to preventDefault during pull gesture \(prevents iOS double
bounce\). Escape email.id in data-id attribute. Add explicit showLogin\(\)
on first visit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git -C /home/aristoi/scripture/supervillain add src/jmap.rs src/routes.rs src/types.rs static/app.js static/index.html static/style.css)

Bash(git -C /home/aristoi/scripture/supervillain commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add attachment upload and sending support

Add /api/upload endpoint that proxies file uploads to Fastmail''s JMAP
blob upload API. Extend EmailSubmission with attachments field and
build_draft_email to wrap body in multipart/mixed when attachments are
present. Add compose UI with file picker \(a key\), upload progress,
cancel/remove, and AbortController cleanup on compose clear.

Greats review fixes: eliminate 25MB body.to_vec\(\) copy in upload_blob,
sanitize X-Filename header, use m.remove\(\) instead of clone in
build_draft_email.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/aristoi/scripture/supervillain commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Use stable IDs instead of array indices for attachment tracking

Replace index-based attachment lookup with monotonic _id counter.
Fixes race condition where splice\(\) during removal shifts indices,
causing in-flight upload callbacks to update the wrong attachment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
